reviews.review_title: In love with this new app
reviews.review_description: I really enjoy using this app! It’s a perfect combination of fun and effective training for all basketball players. The interactive features keep me engaged and motivated, and it never feels boring. At the same time, it provides a great workout that helps improve my skills and fitness on the court.
Just tried BRKER and I’m very impressed. Super smooth experience, great visuals, and really immersive right from the starts. I’m not even a basketball player and I had a lot of fun with this!
This is exactly the training tool that I need to make my high school basketball team! This is going to take me to the next level! Highly recommend!

reviews.review_title: Great fun for me and my kid
reviews.review_description: What a great app for my kid who just started to be in love with basketball he is really enjoying it and me too. Love it!
First time when I tried the MR game and it is excellent. Must have if you are basketball fan
Caught some dudes at the outdoor court messin' with a VR headset. They showed me what it was, and from that point on I was locked in

reviews.review_title: This is great to improve my dribbling
reviews.review_description: Best game I have seen for improving my dribbling
Lol, don’t use this outside at noon—it was a disaster Took it back to my garage and had a blast after.
we have been playing for one hour, competing on the score of the levels. I wish there is no need to always login
Great fun and dribbling training all in one. Amazing!
